case_title: CITIBANK 'SOUTH DAKOTA' N.A. VS. WILLIAM A YAUCH et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITIBANK 'SOUTH DAKOTA' N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YAUCH, WILLIAM A $1,682.27 PRINCIPAL, $250.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,932.27, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF CITIBANK 'SOUTH DAKOTA' N.A.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK 'SOUTH DAKOTA' N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT YAUCH, WILLIAM A DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  AUG-31-2009
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK 'SOUTH DAKOTA' N.A. SERVED APR-22-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT YAUCH, WILLIAM A
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $250.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT YAUCH, WILLIAM A
DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 395 (B): VENUE FOR PERSONAL, FAMILY OR HOUSEHOLD OBLIGATIONS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK 'SOUTH DAKOTA' N.A.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 5
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT CCP 585; COPIES IN LIEU OF ORIIGNALS EVID 1550; ATTY. FEES AND COSTS CCP 1033 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK 'SOUTH DAKOTA' N.A.
